interfaces.name: getPrimaryNavCategories
interfaces.description: Get the main product categories for the primary navigation and homepage entry points.

interfaces.name: getFeaturedProducts
interfaces.description: Get a list of featured products for the homepage hero/featured sections.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of products to return.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category filter for featured products.

interfaces.name: getPopularProducts
interfaces.description: Get a list of popular products (by popularity_score) for homepage and category highlights.

interfaces.name: getCategoryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a given category listing page (material, size, style, rating, price ranges, etc.).

default_sort.description: Default sort option for this category, e.g., 'most_popular'.

interfaces.name: getCategoryProducts
interfaces.description: Get a paginated list of products in a category with applied filters and sorting for category listing pages.

size_label.description: Size label filter, e.g., 'Medium (12 x 16 in)'.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search for products by free-text query with optional filters and sorting (used by global search bar and search results page).

category_id.description: Optional category filter for search results.

interfaces.name: getSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get dynamic filter options for search results based on a query (materials, price range, rating thresholds).

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full product details and configuration/personalization options for a product detail page.

interfaces.name: getProductShippingOptions
interfaces.description: Get available shipping and pickup options for a product, including delivery windows and prices.

delivery_window_text.description: User-friendly delivery estimate, e.g., 'Arrives in 5–7 business days'.

interfaces.name: addConfiguredProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured and personalized product to the single-user cart for shipping or store pickup. Creates the cart internally if it does not exist.

parameters.name: shippingOptionId
parameters.description: Selected shipping option ID when fulfillment_type is 'shipping'.

parameters.name: configuration
parameters.description: Personalization and variant selections for this cart item.

ink_color_selection.description: Selected ink color for pens, e.g., 'black'.

size_label_override.description: Optional size selection if multiple sizes exist.

engraving_names.description: List of names for multi-name products like pen sets.

event_date_text.description: Display form of event date, e.g., 'June 14, 2026'.

event_date.description: ISO 8601 date/time for the event, if needed.

personalization_notes.description: Additional notes or instructions for engraving.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user cart with all line items, personalization summaries, and totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item from the single-user cart.

interfaces.name: addConfiguredProductToWishlist
interfaces.description: Save a configured and personalized product to the single-user wishlist instead of the cart.

interfaces.name: getWishlist
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user wishlist with saved items and their personalization details.

interfaces.name: removeWishlistItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the wishlist.

interfaces.name: moveWishlistItemToCart
interfaces.description: Move or copy a wishlist item into the cart, preserving its configuration.

parameters.name: fulfillment_type
parameters.description: Fulfillment type for the new cart item: 'shipping' or 'store_pickup'.

interfaces.name: getBulkOrderCategories
interfaces.description: Get categories or sections that have products available for corporate and bulk orders.

interfaces.name: getBulkOrderProducts
interfaces.description: List bulk-orderable products within a bulk-friendly category, for the Corporate & Bulk Orders page.

interfaces.name: getBulkQuoteRequestContext
interfaces.description: Get product context and default quantity for a bulk quote request form, based on a selected product and quantity.

interfaces.name: submitBulkQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a bulk quote request for a given product, quantity, budget, and timeline.

parameters.name: project_details
parameters.description: Details including engraving requirements and use case.

interfaces.name: getGiftOccasionOptions
interfaces.description: Get available gift occasions for the Gift Finder, such as 'anniversary' or 'wedding'.

interfaces.name: searchGifts
interfaces.description: Search for gift-appropriate products based on occasion, budget, rating, and free gift wrapping availability.

require_free_gift_wrap.description: If true, only products with free gift wrapping are returned.

interfaces.name: searchStoreLocationsByZip
interfaces.description: Search for nearby store locations that support pickup based on a ZIP code.

interfaces.name: selectStorePickupLocation
interfaces.description: Select a store for pickup in the StorePickupContext based on a chosen store location.

parameters.name: selectedZip
parameters.description: ZIP code used for this selection, if available.

interfaces.name: getStorePickupContext
interfaces.description: Get the current Store Pickup context, including selected ZIP and store, for use in headers and pickup pages.

interfaces.name: getStorePickupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Store Pickup product list, including categories, price suggestions, and rating thresholds.

interfaces.name: getStorePickupProducts
interfaces.description: List products eligible for pickup at the currently selected store, with filters for category, price, rating, and same-day pickup.

same_day_only.description: If true, return only same-day pickup eligible items.

interfaces.name: getConsultationFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable options for the Custom Projects consultation form (project types, formats, contact methods).

interfaces.name: submitConsultationAppointment
interfaces.description: Submit a design consultation appointment request for a custom project such as large wall art.

parameters.name: appointment_date
parameters.description: Requested appointment date in ISO format, e.g., '2026-04-15'.

parameters.name: project_description
parameters.description: Description of the project, including dimensions, style needs, and budget notes.

interfaces.name: getBusinessContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get business contact information and operating hours for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form inquiry that is not covered by bulk quotes or custom project forms.

parameters.name: order_reference
parameters.description: Optional related order or quote reference.

interfaces.name: getFaqs
interfaces.description: Get Help & FAQs content for personalization, shipping, returns, and feature guidance.

interfaces.name: getLegalContent
interfaces.description: Get legal and privacy content such as Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and Cookies Policy.

content.description: Legal text content in HTML or markdown.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current Cart record for the single user or create one if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the Wishlist record for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateStorePickupContext
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the StorePickupContext for the current user flow.
